description_long: This is a modern console cabinet featuring a rectangular body with a striking matte blue finish on its main surfaces. The cabinet is supported by four sturdy wooden legs with a natural wood grain, angled slightly outward for stability and style. The front face of the cabinet includes two drawers, each with a unique live-edge wood panel and small round black knobs, adding a touch of rustic character to the otherwise contemporary design. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the clean lines and minimalist aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a blend of engineered wood and solid wood components, with the drawers likely providing storage for small items. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, hallways, or modern office spaces.
description: A modern blue console cabinet with angled wooden legs and two live-edge wood front drawers with black knobs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid blue face and angled wooden legs, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the blue cabinet and the profile of the wooden leg frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two live-edge wood drawers with black knobs and the full wooden leg structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the blue cabinet body and wooden leg profile.
